summary: Does market volatility make you panic? Or do you freeze when it’s time to invest? Learn how to take control of your investing emotions and build real, long-term wealth in this eye-opening conversation with Shyamali Basu, former EVP at HDFC Mutual Fund, with 30+ years of hands-on experience guiding investors through every kind of market.

seo.title: Master Your Emotions & Build Wealth: Expert Wisdom to Smart Investing - Shaymali Basu
seo.description: Does market volatility make you panic? Or do you freeze when it’s time to invest? Learn how to take control of your investing emotions and build real,

takeaways.text: Shyamali Basu spent 30-plus years at HDFC Mutual Fund, and her core message is that your own emotions, FOMO, herd mentality, fear and greed, do more damage than any market move.
Timing the market is treated as a trap. The steadier path is goal-based investing, where every rupee is attached to a purpose.
Asset allocation and diversification should shift with your life stage, and the episode walks through what that looks like in your 20s, 30s and 40s.
Over-diversification and investing at random are real mistakes. A focused portfolio you actually review beats a scattered one you forget.
Starting late is not a dead end. Building the saving habit and attaching goals to your money can still get you there.
